title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Xpressbees International Enterprises family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Xpressbees International Enterprises:
Xpressbees International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees International Enterprises!
